breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome silent 10+ days as PRED-105 cucumber test quietly expires
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: The dome has not adjudicated PRED-105 (copper-coil cucumber growth) for over 10 days after its 14-day test window closed. The daily_review.json pipeline has auto-regenerated 7 consecutive times without registering the outcome, leaving it in perpetual PENDING status. Six more predictions close April 30.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: N=1 silent-ignore is a data point; N=7 is a pattern. The pipeline behavior is documentable and directly relevant to dome credibility on prospective testing.
